instructions: Read each local image_path and use source_file, anchor_row, and context_rows as context.
Write only structured results to DATA/vision_results.json; do not edit final Markdown directly.
Every result must preserve evidence_id, image_hash, source_file, and image_ref from the request.
Only write red when the image file is truly unreadable/unsupported. For timeout, network loss, rate limit, context overflow, or uncertain model output, write pending instead of red.
Process in small batches and merge results; never delete previous green results.
